description: Verify GUI @Agent invocation stays governed and creates workflow, task, authorization, audit, and notification records.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" project-create --project p1 --name 'Project One' --agents pm,coder >/dev/null; "$office" agent-invoke --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user manager --role project_manager --project p1 --agent coder --task 'Implement GUI backend hook' --run-id direct-run --task-id direct-task > "$tmp/direct.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["invocation_mode"] == "direct_agent" and data["agent_id"] == "coder" and data["workflow_run_id"] == "direct-run" and data["task_id"] == "direct-task" and data["authorization"]["allowed"] is True and data["audit_event_id"]' "$tmp/direct.json"; "$office" workflow-status --run-id direct-run > "$tmp/run.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["invocation_mode"] == "direct_agent" and data["active_revision_id"] and data["tasks"] == ["direct-task"]' "$tmp/run.json"; "$office" task-status --task-id direct-task > "$tmp/task.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["invocation_mode"] == "direct_agent" and data["workflow_run_id"] == "direct-run"' "$tmp/task.json"; "$office" notification-list --user manager > "$tmp/notifications.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert any(item["resource_id"] == "direct-run" for item in data["notifications"])' "$tmp/notifications.json"; set +e; "$office" agent-invoke --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user viewer --role viewer --project p1 --agent coder --task denied > "$tmp/viewer.json" 2> "$tmp/viewer.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; set +e; "$office" agent-invoke --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user manager --role project_manager --project p1 --agent researcher --task denied > "$tmp/roster.json" 2> "$tmp/roster.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; set +e; "$office" agent-invoke --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user manager --role project_manager --project p1 --agent unknown --task denied > "$tmp/unknown.json" 2> "$tmp/unknown.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0
